prompt: Increase test coverage for workflow-dev. Currently only 2 basic tests exist. 1) Add pytest.ini with testpaths=tests, python_files=test_*.py. 2) Create tests/conftest.py with fixtures for mocking crews (researcher, planner, executor, reviewer, tester, deployer), API client, and state. 3) Add tests/test_api.py for API endpoints. 4) Add tests/test_crews.py for all 6 crews. 5) Add tests/test_state.py for state transitions. 6) Add tests/test_emitter.py for emitter pattern. Output COMPLETE when done.
